# Restocking Fee

Acme Shop's Source documents disagree on whether a restocking fee applies: returns_policy_addendum.md states none, while electronics_returns.md states 15% for opened electronics. This page intentionally does not pick a winner — see open_questions.

[Source: returns_policy_addendum.md#restocking-fee]
